name: Shinhan K200 Mthly Short Strang
summary: Shinhan K200 Mthly Short Strang is a structured product or strategy, likely offered by Shinhan Investment Corporation, based on the KOSPI 200 index and utilizing a monthly short straddle strategy. This involves selling both a call and a put option on the KOSPI 200 with the same strike price and expiration date, aiming to profit from low volatility.
